ai.description: SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic could drive one of the largest IPO waves in U.S. history despite remaining unprofitable. ai.title: White House unveils measures aimed at limiting Chinese access to cutting-edge AI
ai.description: The Trump administration unveiled measures aimed at preventing Chinese developers from improperly using leading American AI models to build a rival generation of chatbots. It marks the first major US response to Silicon Valley companies' complaints that China is piggybacking on their success.
